a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000001.name: start_or_resume_session
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000001.description: Create a new chat session or resume an existing one. Pass session_id to resume; omit it to create.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000002.name: send_message
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000002.description: Send a message to the AI. Streams tokens as they arrive. In Train mode may emit skill_saved events when skill files are written.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000003.name: upload_context
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000003.description: Inject training material (plain text or URL) into the session history. Only available in Train mode.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000004.name: get_session_messages
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000004.description: Return the full message history for a session.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000005.name: list_sessions
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000005.description: Return all chat sessions ordered by most-recently-updated first.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000006.name: delete_session
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000006.description: Permanently delete a session and all its messages.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000007.name: list_available_models
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000007.description: Return the list of LLM models this module supports.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000008.name: list_skills
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000008.description: Return metadata for all available skills (project-local and package defaults).

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000010.name: update_session
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000010.description: Update the mode and/or model of an existing session. A mode change injects a system message and resets session state.

a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000009.name: save_config
a1ca4000-0002-0000-0000-000000000009.description: Save a provider API key to the project .env file.
